value.stringValue: Could not save the medical insight.
Please provide more detail before saving the insight.

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Primary_Account
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Primary Account

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Secondary_Account
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Secondary Account

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Tertiary_Account
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Tertiary Account

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Primary_Product
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Primary Product

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Secondary_Product
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Secondary Product

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Tertiary_Product
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Tertiary Product

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Primary_Subject
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Primary Subject

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Secondary_Subject
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Secondary Subject

assignments.name: Increment_Tag_Count_After_Tertiary_Subject
assignments.label: Increment Tag Count After Tertiary Subject

formulas.name: varContentForField
formulas.expression: IF({!varUtteranceExceedsContentLimit}, LEFT({!utterance}, 970) & " [full text captured in notes]", {!utterance})

formulas.name: varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varAccountNameNormalized}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountNameNormalized}, ","), MID({!varAccountNameNormalized}, FIND(",", {!varAccountNameNormalized}) + 1, LEN({!varAccountNameNormalized})), IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountNameNormalized}, " and "), MID({!varAccountNameNormalized}, FIND(" and ", {!varAccountNameNormalized}) + 5, LEN({!varAccountNameNormalized})), ""))))

formulas.name: varAccountRemainderAfterSecondary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), MID({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 1, LEN({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary})), IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), MID({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 5, LEN({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary})), ""))))

formulas.name: varPrimaryAccountToken
formulas.expression: TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountNameNormalized}, ","), LEFT({!varAccountNameNormalized}, FIND(",", {!varAccountNameNormalized}) - 1), IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountNameNormalized}, " and "), LEFT({!varAccountNameNormalized}, FIND(" and ", {!varAccountNameNormalized}) - 1), {!varAccountNameNormalized})))

formulas.name: varPrimaryProductName
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!productName}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!productName}, ","), LEFT({!productName}, FIND(",", {!productName}) - 1), IF(CONTAINS({!productName}, " and "), LEFT({!productName}, FIND(" and ", {!productName}) - 1), {!productName}))))

formulas.name: varProductRemainderAfterPrimary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!productName}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!productName}, ","), MID({!productName}, FIND(",", {!productName}) + 1, LEN({!productName})), IF(CONTAINS({!productName}, " and "), MID({!productName}, FIND(" and ", {!productName}) + 5, LEN({!productName})), ""))))

formulas.name: varProductRemainderAfterSecondary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), MID({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 1, LEN({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary})), IF(CONTAINS({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), MID({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 5, LEN({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary})), ""))))

formulas.name: varSecondaryAccountToken
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), LEFT({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), IF(CONTAINS({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), LEFT({!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), {!varAccountRemainderAfterPrimary}))))

formulas.name: varSecondaryProductName
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), LEFT({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), IF(CONTAINS({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), LEFT({!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), {!varProductRemainderAfterPrimary}))))

formulas.name: varSecondarySubjectName
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), LEFT({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), IF(CONTAINS({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), LEFT({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}) - 1), {!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}))))

formulas.name: varSuccessMessage
formulas.expression: "Insight captured successfully." & IF({!varUtteranceExceedsContentLimit}, " Content is limited to 1000 chars; full dictation saved in Notes.", "")

formulas.name: varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!subjectName}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!subjectName}, ","), MID({!subjectName}, FIND(",", {!subjectName}) + 1, LEN({!subjectName})), IF(CONTAINS({!subjectName}, " and "), MID({!subjectName}, FIND(" and ", {!subjectName}) + 5, LEN({!subjectName})), ""))))

formulas.name: varSubjectRemainderAfterSecondary
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}), "", TRIM(IF(CONTAINS({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, ","), MID({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(",", {!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 1, LEN({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary})), IF(CONTAINS({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, " and "), MID({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}, FIND(" and ", {!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary}) + 5, LEN({!varSubjectRemainderAfterPrimary})), ""))))

formulas.name: varTopicNames
formulas.expression: IF({!varIsAgentChannel}, "Channel: Agentforce dictation | ", "") & IF(ISBLANK({!productName}), "Product: Unspecified", "Product: " & {!productName}) & " | " & IF(ISBLANK({!accountName}), "Account: Unspecified", "Account: " & {!accountName}) & " | Subject: " & IF(ISBLANK({!varMatchedSubjectName}), IF(ISBLANK({!subjectName}), "Needs review", "AI suggests: " & {!subjectName}), IF(OR({!varMatchedSubjectName} = "Other", ISBLANK({!subjectName}), LOWER({!subjectName}) = LOWER({!varMatchedSubjectName})), {!varMatchedSubjectName}, {!varMatchedSubjectName} & " (from '" & {!subjectName} & "')")) & " | FollowUp: " & IF(ISBLANK({!varMatchedSubjectDescription}), IF(ISBLANK({!varMatchedSubjectName}), IF(ISBLANK({!subjectName}), "Capture a specific follow-up action for this insight.", "Consider adding tag [" & {!subjectName} & "] and route to medical strategy for review."), IF(ISBLANK({!accountName}), "Share this insight with the product medical lead and monitor for repeat mentions.", "Brief the account owner to validate impact with " & {!accountName} & " and monitor recurrence.")), {!varMatchedSubjectDescription})

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_MI_Secondary_Account_Link
recordLookups.label: Get Existing MI Secondary Account Link

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_MI_Tertiary_Account_Link
recordLookups.label: Get Existing MI Tertiary Account Link

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_MI_Secondary_Product_Link
recordLookups.label: Get Existing MI Secondary Product Link

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_MI_Tertiary_Product_Link
recordLookups.label: Get Existing MI Tertiary Product Link

variables.description: Optional account name from agent context.
variables.name: accountName

variables.description: Optional channel value from agent context.
variables.name: channel

variables.description: Lightning URL path to the created Medical Insight record.
variables.name: insightUrl

variables.description: Optional product name from agent context.
variables.name: productName

variables.description: Boolean success flag returned to Agentforce.
variables.name: saved

variables.description: Optional subject name from agent context.
variables.name: subjectName
